chapter_title.en: The Chapter of Condolences and Grief During Calamities, Visiting Graves, Lamentation and Mourning Gatherings

text: 505 - وَقَالَ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ: «كَفَاكَ مِنَ اَلتَّعْزِيَةِ بِأَنْ يَرَاكَ صَاحِبُ اَلْمُصِيبَةِ.

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.505 - Imam Jafar ibn Muhammad Al-Sadiq (as) said:
"It is sufficient as a form of condolence for the bereaved to see you."
